name: LLM Grading: Replace Regex/Keyword Semantic Judgment
goal: Replace three semantic keyword/regex patterns in main.py and brain_client.py with LLM grading calls, extracting Ollama logic into a new shared grader.py module.

tasks.name: Create grader.py — LocalGrader foundation
tasks.description: New LocalGrader class extracted from OrchestratorTools._call_local_grader. Handles Ollama HTTP call, config loading, think-tag stripping, schema validation. Returns infrastructure_error dict on any failure, never raises. TDD: write test_grader.py first.

steps.description: Write tests/test_grader.py (12 tests covering happy path, OllamaError, empty/non-JSON response, think-tag stripping, schema validation, config-absent defaults, consistent error shape)
Run tests to verify RED (import error expected)
Create commander/src/ironclaude/grader.py with LocalGrader class
Run tests to verify GREEN (all 12 tests pass)
Stage grader.py and test_grader.py

tasks.name: Refactor orchestrator_mcp.py — delegate _call_local_grader
tasks.description: Add LocalGrader import and self._local_grader to OrchestratorTools.__init__. Replace _call_local_grader body with single delegation call to self._local_grader.grade(). No behavior change at existing 7 call sites. TDD: add delegation test first.

steps.description: Append TestCallLocalGraderDelegation test class to test_orchestrator_mcp.py
Run delegation test to verify RED (AttributeError on _local_grader)
Add 'from ironclaude.grader import LocalGrader' import to orchestrator_mcp.py after line 35
Add self._local_grader = LocalGrader(config_path=self._ollama_config_path) to OrchestratorTools.__init__ after self._ollama_config_path assignment
Replace _call_local_grader body (lines 729-777) with single delegation: return self._local_grader.grade(system_prompt, user_prompt, format_schema)
Run all orchestrator tests to verify GREEN (delegation test passes, no regressions)
Stage orchestrator_mcp.py and test_orchestrator_mcp.py

tasks.name: Replace semantic checks in main.py
tasks.description: Replace _validate_brain_message (directive-ref regex + keyword frozenset) and _detect_prompt_waiting (PROMPT_PATTERNS list) with LocalGrader.grade() calls. Add cache dict. Remove old constants. TDD: write test_main_validate.py first.

steps.description: Create tests/test_main_validate.py with TestValidateBrainMessage (6 tests) and TestDetectPromptWaiting (7 tests)
Run tests to verify RED (AttributeError on _grader)
Add 'from ironclaude.grader import LocalGrader' import to main.py after line 41
Add _BRAIN_MSG_VALIDATION_SYSTEM, _BRAIN_MSG_SCHEMA, _PROMPT_WAITING_SYSTEM, _PROMPT_WAITING_SCHEMA, PROMPT_WAITING_CACHE_TTL constants after logger line in main.py
Delete PROMPT_PATTERNS, _DIRECTIVE_REF_RE, _REASON_KEYWORDS constants (lines 86-103) from main.py
Add self._grader = LocalGrader() and self._prompt_waiting_cache = {} to IroncladeDaemon.__init__ before self._load_staleness_state()
Replace _validate_brain_message (lines 590-603) with LLM grading version using _BRAIN_MSG_VALIDATION_SYSTEM and _BRAIN_MSG_SCHEMA, fail-open on infrastructure_error
Replace _detect_prompt_waiting (lines 1411-1419) with LLM grading version using _PROMPT_WAITING_SYSTEM and _PROMPT_WAITING_SCHEMA, 120s TTL cache on hash(log_tail), fail-safe returns False
Run test_main_validate.py tests to verify GREEN
Run full test suite to verify no regressions
Stage main.py and test_main_validate.py

tasks.name: Replace semantic check in brain_client.py
tasks.description: Replace _check_permission_seeking (_PERMISSION_SEEKING_RE regex) with LocalGrader.grade() call. Preserve throttle logic unchanged. Remove _PERMISSION_SEEKING_RE class constant. TDD: add TestCheckPermissionSeeking to test_brain_client.py first.

steps.description: Append TestCheckPermissionSeeking class (6 tests) to tests/test_brain_client.py
Run tests to verify RED (AttributeError on _grader)
Add 'from ironclaude.grader import LocalGrader' import to brain_client.py after line 23
Add _PERMISSION_SEEKING_SYSTEM and _PERMISSION_SEEKING_SCHEMA module-level constants to brain_client.py after logger line
Delete _PERMISSION_SEEKING_RE class constant (lines 66-77) from BrainClient
Add self._grader = LocalGrader() to BrainClient.__init__ after self._previous_session_context (line 151)

Replace _check_permission_seeking (lines 479-504) with LLM grading version using _PERMISSION_SEEKING_SYSTEM and _PERMISSION_SEEKING_SCHEMA, fail-open returns None on infrastructure_error, throttle logic preserved
Run TestCheckPermissionSeeking tests to verify GREEN
Run full test suite to verify no regressions
Stage brain_client.py and test_brain_client.py
